Documentation index for PebbleOS, detailing features, development, and resources.

# Purpose
The content is part of the documentation structure for PebbleOS, an open-source operating system for smartwatches. It uses a grid layout to organize and present information about PebbleOS, including sections for getting started, browsing the source code, and accessing reference materials. The documentation includes links to external resources, such as the PebbleOS GitHub repository, and provides buttons for easy navigation to different parts of the documentation. The use of `toctree` directives indicates the inclusion of specific documentation files, such as `getting_started.md` and various development and reference documents, which are organized under different categories for user convenience.
